creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 166458
svn diff to update irc/scrollz (patch)

I've been investigating IRC clients, and when I checked
irc/scrollz, I discovered the WWW was taken over by a
pay-per-click organization -- I *hate* that. Let's stop
feeding the pay-per-click site. :)

CHANGES

MASTER_SITES replace pay-per-click with an *actual* mirror
WWW remove pay-per-click site

That's it!

Thanks!

--Chris

currently maintained by ports@ -- implicit approval
